accepted_risks: Reviewer is the same agent as the extractor; independent re-review is recommended before the skill is switched to active.
Only single-channel text extraction was performed; rendered-page dual pass was not completed by an independent reviewer.
Formulae and equations were reconstructed from text extraction; visual confirmation of symbols and rearrangements is recommended.
Official URL and exact retrieved_at are not verified in local archive metadata.

findings.issue: Specification point numbering and bold/P markers were reconstructed from text; visual review is needed to confirm which sub-points are bold/P.
findings.required_fix: Independent reviewer to sample 2-3 topic pages for marker accuracy.

findings.issue: Equation formatting (fractions, subscripts, superscripts) was reconstructed from linear text.
findings.required_fix: Builder to verify formula list against original PDF before using in references.
